comment: Flow_BoxFileRequestCopy (Phase 7 / ADR-0012 / build-plan 04 §7, Wave 2 / box-flow-patterns Fragment 2). THE single file-request-copy flow (the 02-vs-04 duplicate is reconciled to THIS one; the Code App transport binds to fileRequestUrl, not uploadUrl). Returnable CHILD (Request + Response). Copies the hand-built TEMPLATE File Request onto a case's Box folder and returns the live uploader URL — account-free image collection (B2 highest-value piece). HOUSE RULES: gate cr1bd_BOX_FILEREQUEST_ENABLED is READ not defined (default OFF); the copy runs via the CUSTOM connector shared_box_rest CopyFileRequest (op fronts the box-webhook Function; Box CCG minted server-side); File Request is copy-from-template ONLY (the vehicle_registration capture field is baked into the template and CANNOT be varied by the copy). LOAD-BEARING FOLDER GUARD: if empty(folderId) -> respond folder_not_ready and NEVER call Box with a null folder.id (folder existence is guaranteed at intake by box-folder-create; this flow only READS cr1bd_boxfolderid via the caller-passed folderId). The Code App shows honest not_connected / folder_not_ready / gated_off / error messages, never a fake link. Optionally stamps cr1bd_boxfilerequestid + cr1bd_boxfilerequesturl (one-way mirror). [BUILD] state=off. ACTIVATION [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: hand-build the ONE template File Request, record its id -> cr1bd_BOX_FILE_REQUEST_TEMPLATE_ID, import+bind cr1bd_box_rest, flip BOX_API_ENABLED then BOX_FILEREQUEST_ENABLED in a test env, then the BLOCKING B2 live-test (a File-Request upload must fire FILE.UPLOADED — reconciliation sweep is the fallback). Claude never holds a Box credential, never flips the gate.

manual.comment: Invoked by the Code App on 'Send image chaser'. Input { caseId, fileRequestTemplateId, folderId }. fileRequestTemplateId = cr1bd_BOX_FILE_REQUEST_TEMPLATE_ID (the operator-recorded template id). folderId = the case's cr1bd_boxfolderid (the copy API takes folder.id, NOT a path).

Init_outcome.comment: One of: sent | gated_off | folder_not_ready. Returned to the caller (the app maps not_connected/error itself on transport failure).

If_gate_on.comment: Gate-on path only. Gate-off leaves outcome=gated_off (set at init).

If_folder_ready.comment: LOAD-BEARING GUARD: only call Box when BOTH folderId AND templateId are non-empty. empty(folderId) OR empty(templateId) -> outcome=folder_not_ready and NO Box call. folderId empty = the case's Box folder is not yet minted (box-folder-create still running). templateId empty = the operator has not set cr1bd_BOX_FILE_REQUEST_TEMPLATE_ID yet (empty live) — Copy_file_request passes fileRequestId=@variables('templateId') as a PATH param, so calling with it empty would hit Box with an empty file-request path. Guarding both keeps every Box call well-formed.

Copy_file_request.comment: CUSTOM connector CopyFileRequest -> POST /2.0/file_requests/{fileRequestId}/copy { folder:{ id, type:'folder' }, status:'active' }. fileRequestId (path) = the TEMPLATE id; body/folder/id = the case's Box folder id (passed in, read from cr1bd_boxfolderid). Both id fields are @-expressions, never literals. expires_at is intentionally omitted (non-expiring upload link for an open case); add it later if a per-case expiry policy is set.

Stamp_case_file_request.comment: One-way mirror: stamp the File-Request id (webhook correlation / lifecycle) + the live uploader URL (the copy-chaser UX reads it for clipboard). Written Dataverse->Box only; never read back to drive dedup/status.

Audit_box_file_request_copied.comment: Audit the copy (action box_file_request_copied=100000020, Info). Linked to the case.

Set_outcome_folder_not_ready.comment: Either no Box folder yet (cr1bd_boxfolderid null — folder still being created) OR no template id (cr1bd_BOX_FILE_REQUEST_TEMPLATE_ID unset by the operator) -> honest folder_not_ready and NO Box call. The app tells staff the upload link is not ready; a missing TEMPLATE id is an operator-unset config, not a transient error.

Respond_result.comment: Child-flow return. { fileRequestUrl, expiresAt, outcome (sent|gated_off|folder_not_ready) }. The app binds to fileRequestUrl (the 02-vs-04 reconciliation). runAfter If_gate_on on ALL completion outcomes so the child always returns.
